message.content:
>wmlootroute
 When I do that command, it needs to go off a link. What happens is it currently does what it's doing, but to get the screenshot, you have to ask the user for the values, just like how the grid scaling works. You need to input the grid, show the outside, and then say, "How do you want to crop it?" I don't know how we're going to do this, but I mean make it really smart: the crop shows the grid lines every one or something instead of five, and then the user chooses. It's just like 1x1: top, bottom, left, right, something like that.

I don't know what you think of what I'm thinking there. The only hard part would be keeping it all in one image with the command, because you have to edit the message and then edit it again. We need to do extensive planning on this place.
